subject: Bootstrap sales-coworker: draft outreach for cowork.subagentknowledge.com launch
body: Research the three product surfaces (cowork.subagentknowledge.com, coworkers.subagentknowledge.com, subagentknowledge.com) and identify the value prop for solo founders and small teams. Draft an outreach email template for enterprise prospects interested in multi-agent orchestration. Queue to cowork/apps/mail/queued_drafts.jsonl with status=queued. Route outcome to product-management-coworker.
